case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. CCLS INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DOUGLAS HOLLOWAY RE: INTEREST COMPUTATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED JUN-08-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CCLS INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10 INCLUSIVE

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CCLS INC. HARDIN, GARY POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: REGARDING EQUIPMENT DESCRIPTION, PLEASE SEE EXHIBIT 1 OF THE JUDGMENT., OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $11,488.51 DAMAGES, $1,475.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $405.00 COSTS, $147.58 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $13,516.09, PROPERTY VALUE - $15000. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-29-2006, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
